ops.title: rooms.aero observed contract (v2 stays walk)
ops.body:
# rooms.aero ‚Äî Observed Contract (Phase 1 live recon, 2026-07-13)

Read-only recon on the user's own seats.aero Pro account, anonymous session first, then seeded Pro session. All values **observed**, not inferred. rooms.aero has **no public API** ‚Äî only internal `/feapi/*`. AWS WAF present but passable with a real browser (agent-browser passes; raw curl would likely be challenged).

## Architecture & auth
- jQuery/Bootstrap shell; Search + Explore are Vue SPA modules; Mapbox GL maps. Build hash `7bdd82b` at recon time.
- **Programs (6):** choice, hilton, hyatt, ihg, marriott, **wyndham** (observed in map/results legend; `source` slug near-certainly `"wyndham"`, unconfirmed by live capture).
- **Login:** seats.aero SSO (`/sso/init`). Seeding cookies for BOTH `rooms.aero` + `seats.aero` into one abwc session logs rooms.aero in (verified: nav shows account email + PRO + Logout).

## Search inputs (exactly three ‚Äî NO occupancy/guests/rooms input)
| Input | Mechanism | Deep-link param |
|---|---|---|
| Destination | autocomplete ‚Üí `GET /feapi/geocoding?q=` (Mapbox proxy) | `city=<place_name urlenc>` + `lat` + `lng` |
| Date range | window of candidate **check-in** dates | `start=<YYYY-MM-DD>` `end=<YYYY-MM-DD>` |
| Nights | select 1..5, or 0 = any (single-night) ‚Äî **hard max 5** | `nights=<0-5>` |

Fully deep-linkable (validated): `https://rooms.aero/search?city=‚Ä¶&start=‚Ä¶&end=‚Ä¶&nights=N&lat=‚Ä¶&lng=‚Ä¶` ‚Äî loading auto-runs the search. The search area is the **rendered Mapbox viewport bbox** (initialized around lat/lng), not the geocode polygon; a direct `POST /feapi/search` with an explicit bbox bypasses that.

## Internal JSON API (`/feapi/*`) ‚Äî preferred over DOM
### `POST /feapi/search`
Body: `{southwest_latitude, southwest_longitude, northeast_latitude, northeast_longitude, num_nights, date_range_start (ISO Z), date_range_end (ISO Z)}` ‚Üí `{"hotels":[‚Ä¶], "revalidation_id":"<64-hex>"}` (`text/plain` content-type, JSON body). **No pagination** ‚Äî full viewport set in one response (London bbox ‚Üí 117 hotels). Per hotel: `id` (string), `source` (program slug), `name`, `latitude`/`longitude` (float), `lowest_cash_standard` (int, per-night **CENTS** of `currency_code`; 0=none), `lowest_award_standard` (int points/night; 0=none), `lowest_cash_suite`/`lowest_award_suite`, `currency_code` (ISO, **property-local ‚Äî varies per hotel**: USD/MXN/GBP seen), `standard_date` (`YYYY-MM-DD` block check-in; `""`=none), `standard_nights` (int, == num_nights; 0=none), `suite_date`/`suite_nights`, `cpp` (float cents-per-point), `last_checked_at` (**real UTC** ISO-8601 with ¬µs ‚Äî genuinely UTC, NOT seats.aero's fake-`Z` wall clock). "standard" vs "suite" = standard vs premium (suite) award class. All prices are per-night lowest, never stay totals.

### `GET /feapi/revalidation/<revalidation_id>` ‚Äî THE Pro gate
`{"total":N,"successful":M,"queued":K}` = async refresh progress for the last search's stale rows. Anonymous: always `successful:0, queued:0` (banner: "Log into your Pro account to refresh N stale results"). Pro: auto-queued on load; poll until `queued==0`, then re-read search for fresh `last_checked_at` + updated prices. **Not all rows refresh** (observed 50/66).

### `GET /feapi/geocoding?q=` ‚Üí GeoJSON FeatureCollection; take `features[0]` (`place_name`, `center:[lng,lat]`, `bbox`).

### Explore (not the stays path): `/{program}/explore` ‚Üí `GET /feapi/explore` (DataTables server-side paging) + `GET /feapi/reference_data`. Program-scoped country browse; noted for completeness.

## Multi-night semantics
- `num_nights=N` ‚Üí per hotel, the cheapest run of **N consecutive nights whose check-in falls within [start, end]**; `*_date` is the block check-in; the block may extend **past** `end` (end bounds check-in, not checkout).
- Pin an exact stay (check-in C, N nights): `start=end=C`, `nights=N` (validated: all rows dated C, `*_nights=N`).
- `nights=0` = single-night availability. Widening the range adds candidate check-ins, never changes run length.
- **Hard 5-night ceiling**: `num_nights=6`/`7` return `hotels:[]` even where ‚â§5 returns results.

## Filters/sort/pagination
All client-side over the returned set: Programs multi-select, Points min/max, Sort (Best Value / cpp / Points High‚ÜîLow). No server pagination.

## DOM fallback (search results)
Per hotel `.card.mb-2 > .card-body`: program = first `.badge`; property = `h5.card-title`; cpp = `.badge.bg-danger`; per award class a repeating div with `h6` (Standard Room/Suite Room) + `p.card-text.mb-1` (rate "$168.46 or 36,000 pts" ‚Äî prefix varies $/MX$/¬£; may be points- or cash-only) + `p.card-text.mb-0 > small.text-muted` (block check-in); freshness = trailing `p.card-text.mb-0.mt-2 > small.text-muted` ("Updated 2 hours ago"). **No booking/detail links on cards** ‚Äî rooms.aero is a search engine; booking happens on the program's own site.

## Anonymous vs Pro
Data *shape* identical and fully anonymous (geocoding, full `/feapi/search` schema, filters, Explore). **Only current accuracy needs Pro**: anonymous data can be weeks stale (20 days observed); Pro auto-refreshes via revalidation. Pro-only extras: `/cheapest_*` cash finders, manage/city alerts.

## stays.json row shape (from observation)
Namespaced by journey id + interval. Per journey: `interval {check_in, check_out, nights}`, `destination {query, center{lat,lng}, viewport{sw_lat,sw_lng,ne_lat,ne_lng}}`, `provenance {source:"rooms.aero", session: pro|anonymous, fetched_at, search_url, revalidation{total,successful,queued}|null, night_clamped:bool}`, `rooms[]` each `{rooms_aero_id, program, name, lat, lng, currency, last_checked_at, stale, offers[] {award_class: standard|suite, check_in, nights, award_points_per_night, cash_per_night_cents, cents_per_point|null}}`, `search_state: complete|searched_empty|night_clamped|bot_wall|logged_out|date_in_past|geocode_miss|failed`. Per-night points/cash are source of truth; any stay total is an estimate (nightly rates vary within a block; no per-night breakdown exposed).

## Drive protocol (per eligible journey, sequential ‚Äî single browser session)
Preflight once: session must verify Pro (nav shows PRO + Logout); not ‚Üí `logged_out`, return to orchestrator (never attempt Arc CDP live-attach from the walk).
1. Derive check_in (destination-local arrival date), check_out (return-departure local date or explicit `plan.lodging`), nights.
2. nights>5 ‚Üí `num_nights=5`, `night_clamped=true` (disclose). check_in < today ‚Üí `date_in_past`, defer.
3. `GET /feapi/geocoding?q=<city>` ‚Üí `features[0]`; empty ‚Üí `geocode_miss`.
4. Navigate the deep link with `start=end=check_in`, `nights=N`.
5. Wait networkidle; poll `GET /feapi/revalidation/<id>` until `queued==0` (cap ~20‚Äì30 s) or watch the DOM banner reach "refreshed X out of Y"; then re-read.
6. Read results by re-issuing `POST /feapi/search` from page context (clean JSON) ‚Äî DOM scrape only as fallback. Normalize hotel √ó award class ‚Üí rows.
7. Pipe to `stays ingest <slug>` (validates shape + registry slugs, writes journey-namespaced stays.json, stamps provenance + node state).

Failure branches: `searched_empty` (legitimate; record with provenance), `night_clamped`, `bot_wall` (WAF challenge / repeated non-200 ‚Üí back off, `failed {retryable}`), `logged_out` (return early; anonymous rows ingestable only if orchestrator allows, flagged `session:"anonymous"` + stale), `date_in_past`, `geocode_miss`, viewport-too-tight (widen via direct `POST /feapi/search` with the geocode bbox or a padded box).

## Orchestrator decisions (fable, 2026-07-13 ‚Äî these govern B4 implementation)
1. **Occupancy**: dropped from search ‚Äî rooms.aero accepts none; party size is informational only.
2. **>5-night stays**: clamp to 5 + `night_clamped` disclosure (no single-night stitching).
3. **Freshness**: the walk runs Pro; `last_checked_at` + `stale` propagate through stays.json to the board.
4. **Wyndham**: added as a sixth hotel registry row; rooms.aero `source` slug pending first live capture.
5. **`/feapi` from page context**: yes ‚Äî same-origin, read-only, the user's own session, exactly the data the page loads; ingest-side shape validation and no pinned assumptions guard against drift in the undocumented API.
ops.when: Implementing or modifying the getaway stays node, the rooms.aero browser walk, `stays ingest`, or the stays.json schema ‚Äî this is the Phase-1 live-recon contract (2026-07-13) that gates B4, with the orchestrator's decisions appended.
